criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Engagement Metrics
criteria.description: Metrics such as daily active users (DAU) and monthly active users (MAU).

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality and relevance of the educational content provided by the app.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, educational blogs, user feedback

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, tech reviews, developer documentation

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Usability, design, and overall user experience of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, design awards, UI/UX reviews

criteria.name: Accessibility Features
criteria.description: Availability and effectiveness of accessibility features for users with disabilities.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, accessibility reviews, user feedback

criteria.name: In-App Purchases and Subscription Costs
criteria.description: Cost of in-app purchases and subscription plans, if any.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store
